race.description: Venning Auto Electrics / Venning Bros Handicap (56)
race.comment: BROADWAY LANE (7) continued the good recent form when he finished less than a length away in second last time out over 1210m at this track. Has a high cruising speed and will prove very tough to run down if left alone. EQUINE HEADLINE (5) doesn't win often but ran a strong race last time here when nabbing second. Looks slightly easier for him here and is worth serious thought. GRECIAN STORM (4) pushed forward from a wide draw last time and found a forward position then knocked up in the straight to finish eighth. Was a good winner here the start prior though, when leading all the way. Expect her to push forward again. THE INEOS (8) will drift back from his draw and be saved for the final shot at them.
